name: Control Plane v2 – Evidence-Grade Personalized Packet

parameters.query:
SELECT * FROM public.get_user_context('{{ $json.user_id }}')
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Generic' as company_name,
  NULL as company_domain,
  ARRAY[]::uuid[] as competitor_ids,
  ARRAY[]::text[] as competitor_names,
  ARRAY[]::text[] as competitor_domains,
  NULL as user_industry
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM public.get_user_context('{{ $json.user_id }}')
);

SELECT 
  id, company_id, signal_type, severity, confidence::numeric,
  title, summary, evidence_urls::text[] as evidence_urls, source_schema, source_table,
  source_id, meta, created_at
FROM control_plane.signals
WHERE created_at >= '{{ $json.week_start }}'::date
  AND created_at < '{{ $json.week_end }}'::date + interval '1 day'

UNION ALL

SELECT
  e.id,
  e.company_id,
  CASE e.category
    WHEN 'platform_shift' THEN 'horizon'
    WHEN 'distribution_shift' THEN 'distribution'
    WHEN 'buyer_risk' THEN 'objection'
    WHEN 'category_formation' THEN 'narrative'
    ELSE 'horizon'
  END as signal_type,
  e.severity,
  0.7 as confidence,
  e.title,
  COALESCE(e.summary, e.title) as summary,
  ARRAY(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(COALESCE(e.evidence_urls, '[]'::jsonb))) as evidence_urls,
  'horizon' as source_schema,
  'events' as source_table,
  e.id as source_id,
  jsonb_build_object('source_name', s.name, 'category', e.category, 'is_horizon_event', true) as meta,
  e.created_at
FROM horizon.events e
JOIN horizon.sources s ON e.source_id = s.id
WHERE e.created_at >= '{{ $json.week_start }}'::date
  AND e.created_at < '{{ $json.week_end }}'::date + interval '1 day'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM control_plane.signals cs 
    WHERE cs.source_schema = 'horizon' AND cs.source_table = 'events' AND cs.source_id = e.id
  )

ORDER BY signal_type, severity DESC, created_at DESC;

INSERT INTO control_plane.packets (
  week_start, week_end, packet_title, exec_summary, sections, key_questions, bets,
  predictions, action_mapping, user_id, user_company_name, is_personalized
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.week_start }}'::date,
  '{{ $json.week_end }}'::date,
  '{{ $json.packet.packet_title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  ARRAY[{{ $json.packet.exec_summary.map(s => "'" + s.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'").join(',') }}]::text[],
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.packet.sections).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  ARRAY[{{ $json.packet.key_questions.map(q => "'" + q.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'").join(',') }}]::text[],
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.packet.bets || []).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.packet.predictions || []).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.packet.action_mapping || {"this_week":[],"monitor":[]}).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.user_id ? "'" + $json.user_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.user_company_name ? "'" + $json.user_company_name.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.is_personalized || false }}
)
ON CONFLICT (COALESCE(user_id, '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000'::uuid), week_start, week_end) 
DO UPDATE SET 
  packet_title = EXCLUDED.packet_title,
  exec_summary = EXCLUDED.exec_summary,
  sections = EXCLUDED.sections,
  key_questions = EXCLUDED.key_questions,
  bets = EXCLUDED.bets,
  predictions = EXCLUDED.predictions,
  action_mapping = EXCLUDED.action_mapping,
  user_company_name = EXCLUDED.user_company_name,
  is_personalized = EXCLUDED.is_personalized
RETURNING id;

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { complete: true } }];

parameters.query:
-- Create action board cards from the packet's action_mapping
-- Delete existing cards for this user+packet to avoid duplicates
DELETE FROM learning.action_board_cards 
WHERE packet_id = '{{ $('Upsert Packet').first().json.id }}'::uuid;

-- Insert 'this_week' actions
INSERT INTO learning.action_board_cards (user_id, packet_id, action_text, owner_team, priority, signal_ids, column_status, column_order, moved_to_this_week_at, decision_type)
SELECT 
  '{{ $('Format User Context').first().json.user_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $('Upsert Packet').first().json.id }}'::uuid,
  tw->>'action',
  tw->>'owner',
  LOWER(COALESCE(tw->>'priority', 'medium')),
  CASE WHEN tw->'signal_ids' IS NOT NULL 
    THEN ARRAY(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(tw->'signal_ids'))::uuid[]
    ELSE ARRAY[]::uuid[]
  END,
  'this_week',
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CASE LOWER(COALESCE(tw->>'priority','medium')) WHEN 'high' THEN 1 WHEN 'medium' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END)::int,
  NOW(),
  'act_now'
FROM jsonb_array_elements('{{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Packet JSON').first().json.packet.action_mapping.this_week || []).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb) AS tw;

-- Insert 'monitor' actions
INSERT INTO learning.action_board_cards (user_id, packet_id, action_text, signal_headline, owner_team, priority, signal_ids, column_status, column_order, decision_type)
SELECT 
  '{{ $('Format User Context').first().json.user_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $('Upsert Packet').first().json.id }}'::uuid,
  m->>'action',
  m->>'signal',
  'Intelligence',
  'low',
  CASE WHEN m->'signal_ids' IS NOT NULL 
    THEN ARRAY(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(m->'signal_ids'))::uuid[]
    ELSE ARRAY[]::uuid[]
  END,
  'inbox',
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (m->>'signal')::text)::int + 100,
  'monitor'
FROM jsonb_array_elements('{{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Packet JSON').first().json.packet.action_mapping.monitor || []).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb) AS m;

project.name: PMM Signal
project.description: Get a job in the next 60 days
